exclude.name: test body merchantPayOption savedInstruments equals iterable with size greater than 0 when user has saved cards
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes isDisabled for non-paytm instruments
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes contains('emi') when m payModes contains('emi')
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes contains('cod') when m payModes contains('cod')
test body descriptionTextFormat when preference - OFFLINE_SNP_DESC_TXT is enabled
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes payChannelOptions iconurl contain(null)
test when body simplifiedPaymentOffers promoCode is not passed in Initiate Txn API
test body merchantPayOption savedInstruments contains saved card details when user has bajajfn saved card and merchant supports it
assertAllSavedCCPayChannelOptionsReturnedWhenOnlyModeIsProvided
setTxnToken
checkResponseForMultiplePayModesProvided
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes find('cod') displayName
test localisation fields are present when localisation is enabled on merchant and language header is passed
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes find('ppbl') payChannelOptions
test unable to fetch pay options details when head token = null
test body paymentFlow when m hybrid == true && token contains user authentication
Verify UPIPUSHEXPRESS present in add and pay paymodes for app invoke flow and addNPayOnUPIPushSupported is true
test body merchantPayOption paymentModes nb payChannelOptions hasLowSuccess('true')
Verify UPIPUSHEXPRESS not present in add and pay paymodes for non app invoke flow even when addNPayOnUPIPushSupported is true
Verify UPIPUSHEXPRESS not present in add and pay paymodes for app invoke flow and addNPayOnUPIPushSupported is false
test priority in fpo for all paymodes for default merchant
